Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper

package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
Provides JasperReports integration entry points.

Jasper integration classes in this package connect core reporting workflows to Jasper template compilation and rendering.

Responsibilities:

  • Expose Jasper-backed report generation APIs.
  • Coordinate templates and runtime execution.
  • Integrate Jasper output into reporting workflows.
Since:
1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports
    Coordinates report services and report-level abstractions.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.beans
    Contains JasperReports bean-layer data carriers.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
    Implements concrete Jasper report generators.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.model
    Defines model structures used by Jasper report processing.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
    Provides query-building support for Jasper reports.
    nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime
    Contains Jasper runtime execution utilities.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractReportGenerator
    Base class for Jasper report generators.
    BundledTemplateJasperGenerator
    Generator used when only bundle metadata is available on the classpath.
